Room.title: Private Game Room
Room.description: Represents a private game lobby or active game container for URL UNO

hostId.description: Unique identifier of the room creator

hostName.description: Display name of the host user

status.description: Execution state of the active gameplay

players.description: Array of Player entities with card and stats buffers

currentPlayerIndex.description: Index representing the active player cursor

discardPile.description: Array of UnoCard cards placed on discard pile

drawPile.description: Array of UnoCard cards residing inside draw buffer

activeProtocol.description: The active suit protocol (https, http, ftp, ws)

winnerId.description: ID of player who completed transmission first

unoDeclared.description: Map representing UNO flags per player

chatMessages.description: Array of serialized real-time chat messages between players

rooms/{roomId}.description: Lobby and gameplay state documents for synchronized private rooms
